questions.text: Figures on the same base and between the same parallels have equal:
questions.explanation: Parallelograms on the same base and between the same parallels have equal areas.
The area of a triangle is half the product of its base and corresponding height.

questions.text: What is the formula for area of parallelogram?
questions.explanation: Area of parallelogram = base × corresponding height. This is derived from the fact that a parallelogram can be transformed into a rectangle.

questions.text: A diagonal of a parallelogram divides it into two triangles of ________ area.
questions.explanation: A diagonal of a parallelogram divides it into two congruent triangles of equal area.
